entry.title: Addressing the Diminishing Block Subsidy
entry.summary: The primary flaw identified within the fiat system revolves around its governance mechanisms rather than inflationary pressures alone. There exists openness to alternative solutions that maintain the integrity of the 21 million cap, crucial in certain financial models like that of Bitcoin. Seeking such alternatives implies a willingness to reconsider or abandon previously held ideas if a better solution is proposed that adheres to this cap without compromising other financial principles. This approach highlights a proactive stance towards improving financial systems while respecting established limits.
